debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G u v inst✝ p) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G u v inst✝ p) + 1

failed_attempts:
induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [Nat.add_right_comm]
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have : u ∈ p.supportSet := mem_supportSet_of_mem_edgeSet p he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left u v)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact ih
  | @loop u v p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, dartEdge]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_supportSet p)]
    trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      calc (supportSet q).card
        _ ≤ (edgeSet q).card + 1 := ih
        _ ≤ (insert (Sym2.mk (u, _)) (edgeSet q)).card + 1 :=
          add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) _
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ edgeSet q :=
        fun he ↦ hu (mem_support_of_mem_edge q he (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem this]
      exact add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_supportSet q)]
    calc (supportSet q).card
      _ ≤ (edgeSet q).card + 1 := ih
      _ ≤ (insert (Sym2.mk (u, u)) (edgeSet q)).card + 1 :=
        add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) _

have start_mem_support : ∀ {u' v'} (q : G.LoopWalk u' v'), u' ∈ supportSet q := by
    intro u' v' q
    cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have edge_subset_support : ∀ {u' v'} (q : G.LoopWalk u' v') {e}, e ∈ edgeSet q → ∀ x, x ∈ e → x ∈ supportSet q := by
    intro u' v' q e he x hx
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
    | cons h q ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      simp [supportSet, support]
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · simp at hx; rcases hx with rfl | rfl <;> simp [start_mem_support]
      · right; exact ih he x hx
    | loop q ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      simp [supportSet, support]
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · simp at hx; rcases hx with rfl | rfl <;> simp
      · right; exact ih he x hx
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_support p)]
    trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
    · exact ih
    · exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _)
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact ih
      · exact Nat.succ_le_succ (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        exact hu (edge_subset_support p he u (by simp))

induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    have : u ∈ p.support := by cases p <;> simp [support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (List.mem_toFinset.mpr this)]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_insert_le
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_insert_le
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        apply hu
        simp only [edgeSet, edges, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map] at he
        rcases he with ⟨d, hd, hsym⟩
        have : u = d.1 ∨ u = d.2 := by
          rw [Sym2.mk_eq_mk_iff] at hsym
          cases hsym <;> simp_all
        have h_endpoints : d.1 ∈ p.support ∧ d.2 ∈ p.support := by
          clear ih hu he hsym this h
          induction p with
          | nil => simp [darts] at hd
          | cons _ p' ih_sub =>
            simp [darts, support] at hd ⊢
            cases hd with
            | inl h =>
              rw [← h]; constructor
              · left; rfl
              · right; cases p' <;> simp [support] <;> try {left; rfl}
            | inr h =>
              specialize ih_sub h
              rcases ih_sub with ⟨h1, h2⟩
              constructor <;> { right; assumption }
          | loop p' ih_sub =>
            simp [darts, support] at hd ⊢
            cases hd with
            | inl h => rw [← h]; simp
            | inr h =>
              specialize ih_sub h
              rcases ih_sub with ⟨h1, h2⟩
              constructor <;> { right; assumption }
        cases this with
        | inl h => rw [h]; exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr h_endpoints.1
        | inr h => rw [h]; exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr h_endpoints.2
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet q).card + 1; exact ih
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right; apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he; apply hu; exact mem_support_of_mem_edge _ q he (by simp)
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map, List.toFinset_cons]
    have hu : u ∈ supportSet q := by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    trans (edgeSet q).card + 1; exact ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right; apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p' ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_supportSet G _)]
    trans p'.edgeSet.card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
  | cons h p' ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p'.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans p'.edgeSet.card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ p'.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have : u ∈ p'.supportSet := mem_support_of_mem_edgeSet G p' he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      apply add_le_add_right
      exact ih

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, darts, edges]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, darts, edges, support]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_card
    apply Finset.subset_insert
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, darts, edges, support]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ q.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans q.edgeSet.card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card
        apply Finset.subset_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ q.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have := edges_subset_support _ _ he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem this]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, edges, darts, support]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact le_trans ih (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have : u ∈ Sym2.mk (u, v) := Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _
        exact hu (mem_supportSet_of_mem_edgeSet p he this)
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, edges, darts, support]
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := start_mem_supportSet p
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    exact le_trans ih (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)) _)

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have : u ∈ p.supportSet := mem_support_of_mem_edgeSet p he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | @loop u v p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := start_mem_supportSet p
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem]
    · exact le_trans ih (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
    · cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      exact le_trans ih (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _) _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        apply hu
        induction p with
        | nil => simp [edgeSet] at he
        | loop p' ihp =>
          simp [edgeSet, supportSet] at he ⊢
          rcases he with he | he
          · rw [Sym2.mk_eq_mk_iff] at he
            simp [h.ne] at he
          · right; exact ihp he
        | cons h' p' ihp =>
          simp [edgeSet, supportSet] at he ⊢
          rcases he with he | he
          · rw [Sym2.mk_eq_mk_iff] at he
            simp [h.ne] at he
            rw [he]
            cases p' <;> simp [supportSet, support]
          · right; right; exact ihp he

have start_mem_support : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), u ∈ supportSet p := by
    intro u v p
    cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have edge_mem_support : ∀ {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) (e : Sym2 V), e ∈ edgeSet p → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ supportSet p := by
    intro u v p e he x hx
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges] at he
    | cons h p ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · rw [Sym2.mem_iff] at hx; rcases hx with rfl | rfl
        · left; rfl
        · right; exact start_mem_support p
      · right; exact ih he
    | loop p ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · rw [Sym2.mem_iff] at hx; rcases hx with rfl | rfl <;> simp [start_mem_support p]
      · right; exact ih he
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [add_le_add_iff_right]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ edgeSet p := by
        intro he
        have := edge_mem_support p _ he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges]
    have hu := start_mem_support p
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)

induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons,
      List.toFinset_cons]
    have : u ∈ q.supportSet := by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
  | cons h q ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons,
      List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ q.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ q.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have := mem_support_of_mem_edge q he (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact add_le_add_right ih 1

end LoopWalkCounting

have aux : (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 ∧ ∀ e ∈ p.edgeSet, ∀ x, x ∈ e → x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    induction p with
    | nil =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    | cons h p ih =>
      let ⟨ih1, ih2⟩ := ih
      simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
      simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
      constructor
      · by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
        · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
          apply le_trans ih1
          apply Nat.add_le_add_right
          apply Finset.card_insert_le
        · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
          have : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
            intro he
            specialize ih2 _ he u (by simp)
            contradiction
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem this]
          exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih1 1
      · intro e he x hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert] at he
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert]
        cases he with
        | inl he =>
          rw [he] at hx
          cases Sym2.mem_iff.mp hx with
          | inl xu => left; exact xu
          | inr xv =>
            right
            cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        | inr he =>
          right; exact ih2 e he x hx
    | loop p ih =>
      let ⟨ih1, ih2⟩ := ih
      simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
      simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
      constructor
      · have : u ∈ p.supportSet := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
        apply le_trans ih1
        apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_insert_le
      · intro e he x hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert] at he
        simp only [Finset.mem_insert]
        cases he with
        | inl he =>
          left; rw [he] at hx; simp at hx; exact hx
        | inr he =>
          right; exact ih2 e he x hx
  exact aux.1

induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | loop p IH =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, map_cons, toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (mem_support_start p)]
    trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
    · exact IH
    · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
  | cons _ p IH =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, map_cons, toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact IH
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : dartEdge (u, _) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have : u ∈ p.supportSet := mem_support_of_mem_edgeSet p he (by simp [dartEdge, Sym2.mem_mk_left])
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right IH 1

have mem_support {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e} (he : e ∈ p.edgeSet) {x} (hx : x ∈ e) :
      x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet] at he
    | cons _ p ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hx with rfl | rfl
        · left; rfl
        · right; cases p <;> simp [support, supportSet]
      · exact Or.inr (ih he hx)
    | loop p ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      rcases he with rfl | he
      · simp at hx; subst hx; left; rfl
      · exact Or.inr (ih he hx)
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, darts,
      List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := fun he => hu (mem_support p he (by simp))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, darts,
      List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := by cases p <;> simp [support, supportSet]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    trans p.edgeSet.card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _)

have start_mem {u' v'} (q : LoopWalk u' v') : u' ∈ q.supportSet := by
    cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have darts_sub {u' v'} (q : LoopWalk u' v') : ∀ d ∈ q.darts, {d.1, d.2} ⊆ q.supportSet := by
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [darts]
    | cons _ _ ih =>
      intro d hd
      simp [darts] at hd
      cases hd with
      | inl h =>
        subst h
        simp [supportSet, support]
        intro z hz
        cases hz with
        | inl h => left; rw [h]
        | inr h => right; rw [h]; apply start_mem
      | inr h =>
        simp [supportSet, support]
        intro z hz
        right; apply ih d h hz
    | loop _ ih =>
      intro d hd
      simp [darts] at hd
      cases hd with
      | inl h => subst h; simp [supportSet, support]; intro z hz; left; cases hz <;> assumption
      | inr h => simp [supportSet, support]; intro z hz; right; apply ih d h hz
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | @cons u v w h p IH =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans IH
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right IH 1
      · intro he
        rcases List.mem_map.1 (Finset.mem_toFinset.1 he) with ⟨d, hd1, hd2⟩
        simp [dartEdge] at hd2
        have : u ∈ {d.1, d.2} := by rw [← Sym2.mem_mk, hd2]; exact Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _
        have : u ∈ p.supportSet := darts_sub p d hd1 this
        contradiction
  | loop p IH =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem p)]
    apply le_trans IH
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

have start_mem_support : ∀ {x y : V} (w : G.LoopWalk x y), x ∈ supportSet w := by
    intro x y w
    cases w <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have edge_subset_support : ∀ {x y : V} (w : G.LoopWalk x y) (e : Sym2 V),
      e ∈ edgeSet w → ∀ z ∈ e, z ∈ supportSet w := by
    intro x y w
    induction w with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts]
    | cons h p ih =>
      intro e he z hz
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      simp [supportSet, support]
      cases he with
      | inl he =>
        rw [← he] at hz
        cases Sym2.mem_iff.mp hz with
        | inl hx => left; exact hx
        | inr hy => right; rw [hy]; exact start_mem_support p
      | inr he => right; exact ih e he z hz
    | loop p ih =>
      intro e he z hz
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      simp [supportSet, support]
      cases he with
      | inl he =>
        rw [← he] at hz
        simp at hz; subst hz
        exact start_mem_support p
      | inr he => exact ih e he z hz
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact ih
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_insert_le _ _) _
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        have : u ∈ supportSet p := edge_subset_support p _ he _ (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_support p)]
    trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
    · exact ih
    · exact Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_insert_le _ _) _

have h_combined : (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 ∧
      ∀ e ∈ edgeSet p, ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ supportSet p := by
    induction p with
    | nil =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    | cons h q ih =>
      obtain ⟨ih1, ih2⟩ := ih
      constructor
      · simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
        by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet q
        · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
          exact le_trans ih1 (Nat.le_succ _)
        · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
          let e_new := Sym2.mk (u, (darts (LoopWalk.cons h q)).head.2)
          have he_def : edgeSet (LoopWalk.cons h q) = insert e_new (edgeSet q) := by
            simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, e_new]
          rw [he_def]
          by_cases he : e_new ∈ edgeSet q
          · have : u ∈ supportSet q := by
              have hu_in_e : u ∈ e_new := by simp [e_new, edges, darts, Sym2.mem_mk_left]
              exact ih2 e_new he u hu_in_e
            contradiction
          · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
            exact add_le_add_right ih1 1
      · intros e he x hx
        simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert] at he
        simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert]
        cases he with
        | inl heq =>
          rw [heq] at hx
          rw [Sym2.mem_mk_iff] at hx
          cases hx with
          | inl xu => left; exact xu
          | inr xv =>
            right
            cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        | inr hin =>
          right
          exact ih2 e hin x hx
    | loop q ih =>
      obtain ⟨ih1, ih2⟩ := ih
      constructor
      · simp only [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
        have : u ∈ supportSet q := by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem this]
        exact le_trans ih1 (Nat.le_succ _)
      · intros e he x hx
        simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert] at he
        simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert]
        cases he with
        | inl heq =>
          rw [heq] at hx
          rw [Sym2.mem_mk_iff] at hx
          cases hx with
          | inl xu => left; exact xu
          | inr xu => left; exact xu
        | inr hin =>
          right
          exact ih2 e hin x hx
  exact h_combined.1

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    let v' := (support p).headD u
    let e := Sym2.mk (u, v')
    have he_eq : edgeSet (LoopWalk.cons h p) = insert e (edgeSet p) := by
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts]
      congr
      cases p <;> simp [support, v']
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [he_eq]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
        apply Finset.card_insert_le
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [Nat.add_le_add_iff_right]
      by_cases he : e ∈ edgeSet p
      · have : u ∈ supportSet p := mem_support_of_mem_edgeSet G p he (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
        exact ih
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_support G p)]
    trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
      apply Finset.card_insert_le

end LoopWalkCounting

induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | @cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u' ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Nat.add_le_add_iff_right]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u', v') ∉ p.edgeSet := by
        intro he
        have : u' ∈ p.supportSet := mem_supportSet_of_mem_edgeSet p he u' (Sym2.mem_mk_left u' v')
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact ih
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (head_mem_supportSet p)]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

have aux : (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 ∧
             ∀ e ∈ p.edgeSet, ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    induction p with
    | nil =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    | cons h p ih =>
      rename_i u v w
      rcases ih with ⟨ih_card, ih_mem⟩
      constructor
      · simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
        by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
        · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
          apply le_trans ih_card
          apply Nat.add_le_add_right
          apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
        · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
          have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet := by
            intro he
            have : u ∈ p.supportSet := ih_mem _ he u (by simp [Sym2.mem_mk])
            contradiction
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
          apply Nat.succ_le_succ
          exact ih_card
      · intro e he x hx
        simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert] at he
        simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert]
        rcases he with rfl | he
        · rw [Sym2.mem_mk] at hx
          rcases hx with rfl | rfl
          · left; rfl
          · right; cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        · right; exact ih_mem e he x hx
    | loop p ih =>
      rename_i u v
      rcases ih with ⟨ih_card, ih_mem⟩
      constructor
      · simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
        have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
        apply le_trans ih_card
        apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
      · intro e he x hx
        simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert] at he
        simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert]
        rcases he with rfl | he
        · rw [Sym2.mem_mk] at hx
          rcases hx with rfl | rfl <;> left <;> rfl
        · right; exact ih_mem e he x hx
  exact aux.1

end LoopWalkCounting

have mem_start {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) : u ∈ supportSet p := by
    cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have mem_ends {u v : V} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) {e : Sym2 V} (he : e ∈ edgeSet p) :
      ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ supportSet p := by
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, darts] at he
    | cons h p IH =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      intro x hx
      cases he with
      | inl he =>
        rw [← he] at hx
        simp at hx
        cases hx <;> simp_all [mem_start]
      | inr he => right; exact IH he x hx
    | loop p IH =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      intro x hx
      cases he with
      | inl he =>
        rw [← he] at hx
        simp at hx; simp_all
      | inr he => right; exact IH he x hx
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, darts]
  | cons h p IH =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases h_mem : u ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem h_mem]
      exact le_trans IH (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_insert_le _ _) _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem h_mem]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right IH 1
      · intro he
        apply h_mem
        exact mem_ends p he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
  | loop p IH =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (mem_start p)]
    exact le_trans IH (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_insert_le _ _) _)

have edges_subset_support : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) (e : Sym2 V),
      e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p e he x hx
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet] at he
    | cons h p ih =>
      simp only [edgeSet, supportSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | inl heq =>
        rw [Sym2.eq_iff] at heq
        rcases heq with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
        · simp at hx
          cases hx <;> simp [*, supportSet, support]
          right; cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
        · simp at hx
          cases hx
          · simp [*, supportSet, support]; right; cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
          · simp [*, supportSet, support]
      | inr he_in => simp; right; exact ih he_in
    | loop p ih =>
      simp only [edgeSet, supportSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | inl heq =>
        rw [Sym2.eq_iff] at heq
        rcases heq with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ <;> {
          simp at hx
          cases hx <;> simp [*, supportSet, support]
        }
      | inr he_in => simp; right; exact ih he_in
  induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu, Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        have := edges_subset_support p (Sym2.mk (u, _)) he u (by simp)
        contradiction
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    have hu : u ∈ p.supportSet := by cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_of_subset (Finset.subset_insert _ _)

have : (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 ∧ (∀ d ∈ p.darts, d.1 ∈ p.support ∧ d.2 ∈ p.support) := by
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    | loop p ih =>
        rcases ih with ⟨ih_card, ih_darts⟩
        constructor
        · simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
          rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem]
          · exact ih_card.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
          · simp [supportSet, support]; apply List.mem_toFinset.mpr; left; rfl
        · intro d hd
          simp [darts] at hd
          cases hd with
          | head => simp [support]; constructor <;> exact List.mem_cons_self _ _
          | tail _ hd =>
              have := ih_darts _ hd
              simp [support]; constructor <;> apply List.mem_cons_of_mem <;> assumption
    | @cons _ _ u v w h p ih =>
        rcases ih with ⟨ih_card, ih_darts⟩
        constructor
        · simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
          by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
          · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
            exact ih_card.trans (Nat.le_succ _)
          · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
            by_cases he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∈ p.edgeSet
            · exfalso
              apply hu
              simp only [edgeSet, edges, List.mem_toFinset, List.mem_map] at he
              rcases he with ⟨d, hd, heq⟩
              rw [Sym2.mk_eq_mk_iff] at heq
              have := ih_darts d hd
              rw [supportSet, List.mem_toFinset]
              rcases heq with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ | ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ <;> [exact this.1; exact this.2]
            · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
              exact add_le_add_right ih_card 1
        · intro d hd
          simp [darts] at hd
          cases hd with
          | head =>
             simp [support]
             constructor
             · left; rfl
             · right; cases p <;> simp [support]
          | tail _ hd =>
             have := ih_darts _ hd
             simp [support]; constructor <;> apply List.mem_cons_of_mem <;> assumption
  exact this.1

have mem_support_self {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) : u ∈ supportSet p := by
    cases p <;> simp [support, supportSet]
  have edges_subset_support {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) : ∀ e ∈ edgeSet p, ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ supportSet p := by
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts]
    | cons h p' ih =>
      intro e he x hx
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, support, supportSet] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | inl eq =>
        rw [← eq, Sym2.mem_mk_iff] at hx
        cases hx <;> simp_all [mem_support_self]
      | inr mem =>
        right
        exact ih e mem x hx
    | loop p' ih =>
      intro e he x hx
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, support, supportSet] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | inl eq =>
        rw [← eq, Sym2.mem_mk_iff] at hx
        cases hx <;> simp_all
      | inr mem =>
        right
        exact ih e mem x hx
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p' ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (mem_support_self p')]
    trans (edgeSet p').card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card
      apply Finset.subset_insert
  | cons h p' ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p'
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p').card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card
        apply Finset.subset_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ edgeSet p' := by
        intro h
        have : u ∈ supportSet p' := edges_subset_support p' _ h u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1

have head_mem {x y} (q : G.LoopWalk x y) : x ∈ q.supportSet := by
    cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]

  have edge_ends_in_support {x y} (q : G.LoopWalk x y) (e : Sym2 V) (he : e ∈ q.edgeSet) (z : V) (hz : z ∈ e) : z ∈ q.supportSet := by
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
    | cons h' q' ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | inl eq =>
        rw [← eq] at hz
        rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hz with rfl | rfl
        · left; rfl
        · right; exact head_mem q'
      | inr mem =>
        right; exact ih _ mem _ hz
    | loop q' ih =>
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts, supportSet, support] at he ⊢
      cases he with
      | inl eq =>
        rw [← eq] at hz
        rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hz with rfl | rfl <;> exact head_mem q'
      | inr mem =>
        exact Finset.mem_insert_of_mem (ih _ mem _ hz)

  induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card
      apply Finset.subset_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∉ p.edgeSet :=
        λ h => hu (edge_ends_in_support p _ h u (Sym2.mem_mk_left u v))
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (head_mem p)]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_card
    apply Finset.subset_insert

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | @cons u v w h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ p.supportSet
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
      by_cases he : Sym2.mk (u, v) ∈ p.edgeSet
      · have := (mem_support_of_mem_edgeSet G p he).1
        contradiction
      · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
        exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem_supportSet G p)]
    apply le_trans ih
    apply Nat.add_le_add_right
    apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

end LoopWalkCounting

have start_mem : ∀ {x y : V} (q : G.LoopWalk x y), x ∈ supportSet q :=
    fun q ↦ by cases q <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have edge_mem : ∀ {x y : V} (q : G.LoopWalk x y) (e : Sym2 V),
      e ∈ edgeSet q → ∀ z, z ∈ e → z ∈ supportSet q := by
    intro x y q
    induction q with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts]
    | loop q ih =>
      intro e he z hz
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      cases he with
      | inl h =>
        rw [← h] at hz
        simp [supportSet, support]
        rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hz with rfl | rfl <;> simp
      | inr h =>
        simp [supportSet, support]
        right
        exact ih e h z hz
    | cons u' v' w' h q ih =>
      intro e he z hz
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      cases he with
      | inl h_eq =>
        rw [← h_eq] at hz
        simp [supportSet, support]
        rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hz with rfl | rfl
        · left; rfl
        · right; exact start_mem q
      | inr h_mem =>
        simp [supportSet, support]
        right
        exact ih e h_mem z hz
  induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, edgeSet]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem (start_mem p)]
    trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
    · exact ih
    · apply add_le_add_right
      apply Finset.card_le_card
      apply Finset.subset_insert
  | cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    by_cases hu : u' ∈ supportSet p
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_card
        apply Finset.subset_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      have he : Sym2.mk (u', v') ∉ edgeSet p := by
        intro he
        have : u' ∈ supportSet p := edge_mem p _ he u' (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
      apply add_le_add_right ih 1

have : (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 ∧
         ∀ e ∈ edgeSet p, ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ supportSet p := by
    induction p with
    | nil =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    | loop p ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨ih_card, ih_subset⟩
      constructor
      · simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
        have hu : u ∈ supportSet p := List.mem_toFinset.mpr (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
        rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
        exact le_trans ih_card (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _) _)
      · intro e he x hx
        simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
        rcases he with rfl | he
        · simp [supportSet, support]; rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hx with rfl | rfl <;>
            exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
        · simp [supportSet, support]; right; exact ih_subset _ he _ hx
    | cons h p ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨ih_card, ih_subset⟩
      constructor
      · simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
        by_cases hu : u ∈ supportSet p
        · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
          exact le_trans ih_card (Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card_insert _ _) _)
        · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
          have : Sym2.mk (u, _) ∉ edgeSet p := by
            intro he
            have := ih_subset _ he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
            contradiction
          rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem this]
          exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih_card 1
      · intro e he x hx
        simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
        rcases he with rfl | he
        · simp [supportSet, support]
          rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hx with rfl | rfl
          · left; rfl
          · right; exact List.mem_toFinset.mpr (List.mem_cons_self _ _)
        · simp [supportSet, support]; right; exact ih_subset _ he _ hx
  exact this.1

have start_mem : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), u ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p
    cases p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have edge_subset : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) (e : Sym2 V), e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts]
    | cons h p ih =>
      intro e he x hx
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      cases he with
      | inl heq =>
        subst heq
        simp [supportSet, support]
        rcases Sym2.mem_mk_iff.mp hx with rfl | rfl
        · left; rfl
        · right; exact start_mem p
      | inr he =>
        simp [supportSet, support]
        right
        exact ih e he x hx
    | loop p ih =>
      intro e he x hx
      simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
      cases he with
      | inl heq =>
        subst heq
        simp at hx; subst hx
        simp [supportSet, support]
      | inr he =>
        simp [supportSet, support]
        right
        exact ih e he x hx
  induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | cons h p ih =>
    case cons u' v' w' h p ih =>
      simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, darts]
      by_cases hu : u' ∈ p.supportSet
      · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
        apply le_trans ih
        apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
        apply Finset.card_le_card_insert
      · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
        have he : Sym2.mk (u', v') ∉ p.edgeSet := by
          intro he
          have := edge_subset p _ he u' (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
          contradiction
        rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem he]
        exact Nat.succ_le_succ ih
  | loop p ih =>
    case loop u' v' p ih =>
      simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, edgeSet, edges, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, darts]
      have hu : u' ∈ p.supportSet := start_mem p
      rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      apply le_trans ih
      apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
      apply Finset.card_le_card_insert

have h_combined : (supportSet p).card ≤ (edgeSet p).card + 1 ∧
      ∀ e ∈ edgeSet p, ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ supportSet p := by
    induction p with
    | nil =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
    | cons h p ih =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
      constructor
      · rw [Finset.card_insert_eq_ite, Finset.card_insert_eq_ite]
        split_ifs with h_u h_edge
        · exact ih.1
        · exact le_trans ih.1 (Nat.le_succ _)
        · exfalso
          have : u ∈ supportSet p := ih.2 (Sym2.mk (u, _)) h_edge u (by simp)
          contradiction
        · exact le_trans ih.1 (Nat.le_succ _)
      · intro e he x hx
        simp at he
        cases he with
        | inl h_eq =>
          rw [← h_eq] at hx
          simp at hx
          cases hx with
          | inl xu => subst xu; simp
          | inr xv =>
            subst xv
            right
            cases p <;> simp [support, supportSet]
        | inr h_mem =>
          right
          exact ih.2 e h_mem x hx
    | loop p ih =>
      simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
      have u_in_supp : u ∈ supportSet p := by cases p <;> simp [support, supportSet]
      constructor
      · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem u_in_supp]
        apply le_trans ih.1
        apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_insert_le
      · intro e he x hx
        simp at he
        cases he with
        | inl h_eq =>
          rw [← h_eq] at hx
          simp at hx
          subst hx
          exact u_in_supp
        | inr h_mem =>
          exact ih.2 e h_mem x hx
  exact h_combined.1

have start_mem_support : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v), u ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p
    induction p <;> simp [supportSet, support]
  have edges_subset : ∀ {u v} (p : G.LoopWalk u v) (e : Sym2 V),
      e ∈ p.edgeSet → ∀ x ∈ e, x ∈ p.supportSet := by
    intro u v p e he x hx
    induction p with
    | nil => simp [edgeSet, edges, darts] at he
    | cons h p ih =>
      simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert] at he
      simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert]
      cases he with
      | inl heq =>
        rw [← heq] at hx
        simp at hx
        cases hx with
        | inl hxu => left; exact hxu
        | inr hxv =>
          right
          exact start_mem_support p
      | inr he_mem =>
        right
        exact ih e he_mem x hx
    | loop p ih =>
      simp only [edgeSet, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert] at he
      simp only [supportSet, support, List.toFinset_cons, Finset.mem_insert]
      cases he with
      | inl heq =>
        rw [← heq] at hx
        simp at hx; subst x; left; rfl
      | inr he_mem =>
        right; exact ih e he_mem x hx
  induction p with
  | nil =>
    simp [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts]
  | loop p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem]
    · trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_of_subset
        apply Finset.subset_insert
    · exact start_mem_support p
  | cons h p ih =>
    simp only [supportSet, edgeSet, support, edges, darts, List.map_cons, List.toFinset_cons]
    by_cases hu : u ∈ (support p).toFinset
    · rw [Finset.insert_eq_of_mem hu]
      trans (edgeSet p).card + 1
      · exact ih
      · apply Nat.add_le_add_right
        apply Finset.card_le_of_subset
        apply Finset.subset_insert
    · rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem hu]
      rw [Finset.card_insert_of_not_mem]
      · exact Nat.add_le_add_right ih 1
      · intro he
        have : u ∈ (support p).toFinset := edges_subset p _ he u (Sym2.mem_mk_left _ _)
        contradiction
